description: A robust, high-visibility header. Left: The AgriKisan logo (a stylized leaf-chip hybrid). Right: A prominent 'Language Switcher' dropdown (e.g., 'हिन्दी | English') using ui/dropdown-menu.tsx. Navigation is simplified into a 'Mega-Menu' style on desktop and a 'Bottom-Sheet' style drawer on mobile. Background is solid bg-background initially, transitioning to bg-background/80 with backdrop-blur-xl on scroll. No search bar here to keep focus on the hero assistant.
